description_long: This is a hand axe with a robust wooden handle and a dark metal head, featuring a broad, slightly curved blade on one side and a pointed pick on the opposite side. The handle is cylindrical, tapering slightly towards the head, and ends in a rounded knob for improved grip and control. The metal head is securely mounted atop the handle, with visible fastenings or rivets suggesting a traditional wedged attachment. The blade is wide and flat, suitable for chopping, while the pick end is narrow and sharp, ideal for piercing or prying. The wood of the handle has a rich, dark finish, and the metal head appears matte with a slightly rough texture. No visible branding or decorative engravings are present, giving the axe a utilitarian, functional appearance.
description: A sturdy hand axe with a dark wooden handle and a matte black metal head, featuring a wide blade and a pointed pick. The design is utilitarian with no visible branding or decorative elements.
description_view_0: The axe is shown from the side, clearly displaying the wide blade and pointed pick, as well as the full length of the wooden handle.
description_view_1: The axe is viewed from the front, showing the narrow profile of the blade and pick, with the handle appearing as a thin vertical line.
description_view_2: The opposite side view of the axe, again highlighting the blade and pick, with the handle's curvature and knob visible.
description_view_3: The rear view of the axe, showing the back of the head and the handle, with the pick aligned directly towards the viewer.
attribute_handle_type: Cylindrical, straight wooden handle with a rounded knob at the end, smooth finish, no visible grip texture.
attribute_blade_design: Single wide, flat blade with a slightly curved edge on one side and a pointed pick on the opposite side; no beard or decorative features.
attribute_mounting_style: Traditional wedged mounting with visible fastenings securing the metal head to the wooden handle.
